$comment: QVAC Hackathon I transparency disclosure: every remote endpoint this project contacts. All AI inference (embeddings, LLM completions) runs 100% on-device via @qvac/sdk — no cloud AI API is used anywhere.

remoteCalls.purpose: One-time download of the embedding model at first launch (then fully offline)
One-time download of the LLM at first launch (then fully offline)
Peer discovery on the public Holepunch DHT (Hyperswarm default bootstrap nodes); peer-to-peer connections are then end-to-end encrypted via Noise
remoteCalls.endpoint: Holepunch public DHT bootstrap (Hyperswarm defaults; no custom bootstrap configured)
remoteCalls.dataSent: DHT routing records for the room topic; your IP is visible to peers you connect with (see SECURITY.md)
